word: H3665 - כָּנַע - kânaʻ - kaw-nah' - Bring down

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּנע

Transliteration: kâna‛

Phonetic: kaw-nah'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be humble, be humbled, be subdued, be brought down, be low, be under, be brought into subjection
    1. (Niphal)
      1. to humble oneself
      2. to be humbled, be subdued
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to humble
      2. to subdue

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1001

Part(s) of speech: Verb
